g.text: PROTOTYPE · THE SYSTEM, STATE BY STATE
Six states where the interface finally speaks.
teaching the user in each state.

text.tspan: A welcome that teaches looking, not lore.
Three things first: where you are,
how to look, how to undo.
Only the tools the task needs; the rest recedes.
Hover any tool for what, why, and what to try.

g.text: Turns a base into a body.

text.tspan: The few keys that matter, never more than a glance away.
Each stage saved and celebrated as a small win.
Drift, mistake, or panic — recenter and continue.
